videos.headline: Alabama Crimson Tide vs. Georgia Bulldogs: Full Highlights
videos.description: Alabama Crimson Tide vs. Georgia Bulldogs: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama Crimson Tide vs. Georgia Bulldogs: Full Highlights) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 17 Bama snaps No. 5 Georgia's 33-game home winning streak
videos.description: The Crimson Tide surge to a 14-0 lead and then hold on for a gritty 24-21 win over the Dawgs in Athens, where UGA hadn't lost a game in nearly six years.

videos.headline: Ty Simpson caps a 14-play drive with a TD to Germie Bernard
videos.description: Ty Simpson throws it to Germie Bernard to give Alabama a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson caps a 14-play drive with a TD to Germie Bernard) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama's Ty Simpson connects with Isaiah Horton for a TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson hits Isaiah Horton in the end zone to extend Alabama's lead over Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama's Ty Simpson connects with Isaiah Horton for a TD) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colbie Young walks in for a Georgia TD
videos.description: Gunner Stockton throws it up to a wide-open Colbie Young, who walks in for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colbie Young walks in for a Georgia TD) 2025/09/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Conor Talty kicks 24-yard field goal) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's Chauncey Bowens takes the toss into the end zone
videos.description: Gunner Stockton tosses the ball to Chauncey Bowens, who scores Georgia's second touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's Chauncey Bowens takes the toss into the end zone) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson keeps it for an Alabama TD before the half
videos.description: Ty Simpson rolls to his right and keeps it for a touchdown to give Alabama a 24-14 lead at the half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson keeps it for an Alabama TD before the half) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson throws pass to 6-foot-7, 366-pound tackle Kadyn Proctor
videos.description: Ty Simpson throws it out to Kadyn Proctor, who barrels over everyone to set up first-and-goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson throws screen to 6-foot-7, 366-pound tackle Kayden Proctor) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's Josh McCray powers his way into the end zone
videos.description: Josh McCray fights his way into the end zone to cut into Alabama's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's Josh McCray powers his way into the end zone) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama gets stuffed on 4th-and-1
videos.description: Ty Simpson is sacked behind the line and the Crimson Tide turn the ball over on downs.

videos.headline: Ty Simpson converts on 3rd-and-5 to seal Alabama's win
videos.description: Ty Simpson rolls out and hits Jam Miller to seal Alabama's win over Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson converts on 3rd-and-5 to seal Alabama's win) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kalen DeBoer says Bama survived 'heavyweight fight' at UGA
videos.description: After No. 17 Alabama stuns No. 5 Georgia in Athens, DeBoer says he knew his team was in for an "old-school, 15-round" bout and is proud of how they battled.

videos.headline: Bama's Ty Simpson walks through game-sealing first down vs. Georgia
videos.description: Simpson expresses how thankful he is for Bama's elite defense and the way they stepped up against the Bulldogs while detailing what he saw on the first down that sealed the game.
